hero.headline: Authentic Hamary from Kordofan
hero.description: A limited shipment of 450 authentic Hamary sheep arriving from Kordofan, Sudan via Port Sudan to Jeddah Port — pre-book now to secure your sacrifice at the best early-bird price.

why.title: Why Hamary?
why.subtitle: The most prized sheep for Hajj sacrifice — straight from the pastures of North Kordofan
why.origin_desc: Raised on the rich natural pastures of Kordofan — one of Africa's most fertile livestock regions. True provenance, traceable from source.
why.coat_desc: The Hamary's signature warm-red fleece is unmistakable — a centuries-old breed marker prized across the Arabian Peninsula.
why.flavor_desc: Naturally grazed on diverse vegetation, Hamary sheep develop lean, aromatic meat with a tenderness that sets them apart from grain-fed alternatives.
why.tradition_desc: The Hamary has been the preferred choice for Udhiyah and Hadiy among Saudi families for generations — for good reason.
why.specs_breed: Authentic Hamary from North Kordofan, Sudan
why.specs_weight: Minimum 25 kg live weight per sheep

journey.title: The Journey
journey.subtitle: From the pastures of Kordofan to your door in Jeddah
journey.kordofan_desc: Natural pastures of North Kordofan — where the Hamary breed has thrived for centuries
journey.port_sudan_desc: Veterinary inspection and certified loading at Port Sudan for sea transport
journey.jeddah_desc: Arrival at Jeddah Port — your reserved sheep delivered within the Jeddah area

trust.title: About Smart Service
trust.subtitle: Your trusted livestock partner in Jeddah for the Hajj season

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about your Hamary sheep booking
faq.q1: What if the shipment is delayed?
faq.a1: If the shipment is delayed beyond the estimated arrival date, we will notify you immediately via phone and WhatsApp. Your booking and pricing are fully guaranteed regardless of arrival date. You may request a full refund if the delay exceeds 14 days.
faq.q2: Can I inspect the sheep before paying?
faq.a2: We offer a pre-payment inspection visit at our Jeddah facility once the shipment arrives. You can view your reserved sheep in person. Contact us via WhatsApp to schedule your visit.
faq.q3: What is the guaranteed weight and age?
faq.a3: Every Hamary sheep is guaranteed to be a minimum of 25 kg live weight (30 kg for VIP tier) and not exceeding 1 year of age. These specifications are printed on your invoice and backed by our veterinary certificates.
faq.q4: Are the sheep suitable for Hajj sacrifice (Udhiyah)?
faq.a4: Yes. All our Hamary sheep are under 1 year old, in excellent health, and free from any defects that would disqualify them for Udhiyah, Hadiy, or Aqiqah. Each sheep comes with a veterinary health certificate.
faq.a5: Halal slaughter is available as an optional service at our partner slaughterhouse in Jeddah. Select 'Delivery to Slaughterhouse' during booking. Slaughter fees are not included in the sheep price.
faq.a6: Full refund if you cancel more than 7 days before the shipment arrival date. 50% refund for cancellations within 7 days. No refund for cancellations after the sheep have arrived at Jeddah Port. All refunds are processed within 5 business days.
faq.q7: How does delivery work in Jeddah?
faq.a7: We deliver to Jeddah and nearby areas within approximately 50 km. Choose your preferred city from the booking form. Delivery is coordinated after you confirm payment. You will receive a WhatsApp message with the delivery time window.
faq.q8: When will my order be delivered?
faq.a8: Deliveries begin after the shipment clears Jeddah Port customs, typically within 2–3 days of arrival. You will select your preferred delivery date during booking (subject to availability). We will confirm your exact time slot via WhatsApp.
faq.q9: What if I want to cancel?
faq.a9: To cancel, contact us via WhatsApp or phone with your booking reference. Refunds are processed per our refund policy above. Once the sheep have been loaded for delivery, cancellation is no longer possible.

footer.delivery_notice: Delivery within Jeddah and nearby areas only
footer.tagline: Authentic Hamary sheep from Kordofan, Sudan — delivered in Jeddah for Hajj.
